english: What is the name of the national anthem of India?
hindi: भारत का राष्ट्रीय गान क्या है?
vietnamese: Tên quốc ca của Ấn Độ là gì?
correct_answer: The national anthem of India is called 'Jana Gana Mana'. It was written by Rabindranath Tagore.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating a different name or refusing to answer due to lack of knowledge about Indian culture.
